message:
feat(hybrid): add TwoTierMetrics for search analytics and tracking

Add comprehensive metrics tracking for two-tier progressive search:

- TwoTierMetrics struct to capture search performance data:
  - Query (truncated for privacy), latencies (fast/quality/total)
  - Rank correlation (Kendall tau), items promoted/demoted
  - Skip reason, daemon usage, blend factor, result count
  - Serializable to JSONL for offline analysis

- compute_rank_changes() to compare initial vs refined rankings
- kendall_tau() to measure rank correlation between search phases
- log_to_file() and log_to_default() for metrics persistence

- 8 unit tests covering:
  - Metrics creation and query truncation
  - Rank change detection (no movement, reversal)
  - Kendall tau (identical, reversed, empty, single item)

This implements the TwoTierMetrics acceptance criteria from bd-3az0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
